\begin{table}[p]
\centering
\caption{Mean best fitness on the CEC~2013 LSGO benchmark at $D = 10^{3}$ after $3 \times 10^{6}$ function evaluations with differential evolution (DE). Rows are benchmark functions $F_1$--$F_{15}$; columns are subspace maps and baselines (assignment mode and DE settings as indicated). Each entry is the mean of final best fitness over replicate runs for that method. Lower is better. Bold entries are the best mean in each row. Missing cells indicate no finished runs for that function and method.}
\label{tab:lsgo-all-fs-dim1000}
